name: Beef Wellington (Individual)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the mushrooms, onions, sherry, butter, and parsley in a frying pan until all liquid is absorbed and the mixture resembles a paste.
2. Cover the tops of the steaks with the mushroom mixture.
3. Partially thaw the puff pastry shells and roll them out thin enough to cover the top, sides, and part of the bottom of each steak.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and store in the refrigerator until serving time.
5. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Cook the steaks on a rack, uncovered, for 25 minutes. They will be rare but will continue cooking while the dish is being prepared.
7. Serve with Béarnaise sauce.
